caption: A man with a mustache wearing a red shirt sits in a room with white walls and vertical window panels. He is flanked by other men, including one in a tan military-style uniform with insignias on the shoulder. The scene is overlaid with a digital animation of bright orange and yellow flames that flicker and dance across the foreground, partially obscuring the people. As the sequence progresses, the man in the red shirt remains relatively still, while the animated flames shift and change shape, moving across his chest and the surrounding space. The background remains constant, showing the indoor setting and the other individuals sitting behind him. At the bottom edge of the sequence, partially obscured by the fire effects, some text is visible, though only fragments are legible.
